theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Legal/Enterprise compliance tools require absolute authority, clarity, and trust. The design must feel like a premium editorial publication or a sophisticated legal instrument, not a generic tech-bro startup. Color exists to guide action and signal risk, not for decoration.

headings.rules: Use for all headings. Tight letter spacing (`tracking-tight` or `tracking-tighter`). Maximum size for Hero is `text-6xl`. Never use 'Inter' or 'Roboto'.

body.rules: Use for body copy, form inputs, and legal text. Loose line-height (`leading-relaxed`) for readability. Small labels MUST be Uppercase + Wide Spacing (`tracking-widest`).

color_system.rules: Colors must be stark. The UI should be predominantly monochrome (black/white/gray). Use accent colors strictly for the Risk Level Badges, the Scorecard (0-100), and the Primary CTAs. Do not use gradients.

layout_and_spacing.marketing_pages: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page. Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid). Wide gaps (`gap-8` to `gap-12`). Asymmetry creates tension. Heavy use of negative space. Padding `p-8` to `p-16`.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_tool: Use Shadcn components heavily. Grid Mode B (Control Room). Strict grid hierarchy. Dense and compact spacing for the quiz/flowchart. Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radii: Sharp and brutalist. Set `--radius: 0rem;` or max `0.25rem`. Use 1px solid borders for definition instead of soft shadows. Use `border-collapse` style for feature grids.

motion_and_interactions.rules: Micro-interactions only. Crisp, fast transitions. No lazy-loading images or excessive parallax. Use `transition-all duration-200 ease-out` for hover states. Hover states MUST explicitly set text color (e.g., `hover:bg-zinc-900 hover:text-white`).

component_guidelines.buttons: Sharp corners. High contrast. `bg-zinc-900 text-white hover:bg-black` for default, `bg-[#0020C2] text-white hover:bg-[#00189B]` for primary checkout CTA.
component_guidelines.quiz_flowchart: Use heavily customized Shadcn RadioGroup. Style as large, clickable cards with 1px borders. Active state: `border-[#0020C2] bg-blue-50/10`.
component_guidelines.scorecard: Large, bold typography (`text-6xl`). Color-coded badge based on risk level. Use `IBM Plex Sans` for the numeric score.
component_guidelines.compliance_badge: SVG must have sharp geometry, high contrast black/white base, and a pop of the corresponding risk color.
component_guidelines.testimonials: Monochrome photos if possible, harsh grid layout, `border-b` dividers instead of cards.

hero_background.description: Black and white photo of an abstract building. Use as a subtle hero background with heavy overlay (`bg-black/80` for dark mode, `bg-white/90` for light mode).

compliance_abstract.description: Macro shot of a legal compliance stamp. Perfect for the Report/PDF feature highlight section.

testing_requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="start-quiz-button"`, `data-testid="risk-score-badge"`).
